name: @datalog/vscode-extension
description: Syntax highlighting and editor configuration for Datalog source files (.dl).

datalog.trace.server.markdownDescription: Controls the amount of language-server protocol trace written to the Datalog Language Server output channel.

datalog.server.revealOutputChannelOn.markdownDescription: Controls when VS Code automatically reveals the Datalog Language Server output channel.

scripts.dev: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && yarn workspace @datalog/lsp build && yarn watch
scripts.package: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && yarn workspace @datalog/lsp build && yarn workspace @datalog/vscode-extension build && node ./scripts/create-package-stage.mjs
scripts.vsce:package: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && yarn workspace @datalog/lsp build && yarn workspace @datalog/vscode-extension build && node ./scripts/create-package-vsix.mjs
scripts.smoke: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && yarn workspace @datalog/lsp build && yarn workspace @datalog/vscode-extension build && node ./scripts/run-smoke.mjs
scripts.smoke:broken: yarn workspace @datalog/parser build && yarn workspace @datalog/datalog-migrate build && yarn workspace @datalog/lsp build && yarn workspace @datalog/vscode-extension build && node ./scripts/run-smoke.mjs --broken
